steps.title: Fastest check: compare a table or graph
steps.content: For an equivalent-expression question, enter the original expression and the answer choices in a calculator table or graph. The correct choice must match for several inputs, not just one. The matching choice is A, $12x^{2}-96$.

steps.title: Algebra check
steps.content: Use the work below to confirm the identity for every allowed input. This matters because one random matching input is only a quick screen, not a proof that two expressions are always equivalent.

steps.title: Explanation
steps.content:
• $12x^{2}-96$: 12x² − 96 — matches 12 · x² minus 12 · 8 exactly.
  • $12x^{2}-20$: 12x² − 20 — subtracts 8 + 12 instead of multiplying.
  • $12x^{2}-8$: 12x² − 8 — does not distribute 12 onto the constant term.
  • $12x^{2}+4$: 12x² + 4 — adds 12 and −8 instead of distributing.
That matches the correct answer, so A is correct.
